name: Next.js Auto Post System with Facebook and Google Drive Integration (Fixed)

summary: Removed direct Receive Auto-Post Command -> Shuffle Pages connection; start flow should go through Validate API Key and Route by Action Type first.
Removed Send Running Status -> Fetch Drive Files main-path dependency; Send Running Status should be side-effect only.
Send Running Status must fan out with Shuffle Pages from start route.
Prepare Caption must fan out to both Send Posting Status and Get Page Access Token so callback status does not replace source items.
Fetch Drive Files folderId must come from webhook/body.folderId rather than a hard-coded Google Drive folder ID.
Build Page/Image Pairs should read pageIds from Shuffle Pages and images from Shuffle Images directly.
Merge Final Caption must be Mode=Append, Inputs=2.
Send Success Status currentJobStatus should be 'posted', not 'completed'.
Send Pause/Stop Status currentJobStatus should be 'pending', not 'failed'.
Recommended: per-item success/failed callbacks use autoPostStatus='running'; final waiting state should be set only by Send Waiting Status.

delete: Send Running Status -> Fetch Drive Files
Send Posting Status -> Get Page Access Token
add: Route by Action Type(start) -> Shuffle Pages
Prepare Caption -> Get Page Access Token
keep: Merge Shuffled Data -> Build Page/Image Pairs
Download Image Binary -> Merge Caption With Binary(input1)
Merge Final Caption -> Merge Caption With Binary(input2)
Post to Facebook Page -> Merge Post Result with Caption Data(input1)
Extract Page Token -> Merge Post Result with Caption Data(input2)
